title: Compact F3 Plus
description: replaces the vanilla F3 with a clean, minimal hud overlay.
body:
# Compact F3 Plus

A minimal, fully customizable HUD overlay for NeoForge and Fabric that replaces the vanilla F3 debug screen with a clean, readable interface.

### Modes

- **Replace F3 (default):** `F3` opens the compact HUD instead of the vanilla debug screen.
- **Standalone:** Keep vanilla F3 intact and toggle the HUD separately via `F8` (rebindable in Controls).

### HUD Elements

- FPS - current and average, with dynamic color indicators based on thresholds
- RAM usage
- Lag meter - stutter rate monitor for diagnosing frame drops
- Server TPS
- XYZ coordinates
- Network ping
- Facing direction: cardinal + pitch
- Biome and dimension
- Block and sky light levels
- Session timer
- In-game time and day counter
- Slime chunk indicator
- Horizontal and vertical movement speed
- Item durability
- Currently playing music track
- Rendered entity count
- Crop growth progress

### Configuration

Every element can be individually toggled. Settings are saved to `config/compactf3plus.json` and accessible via Mod Menu (Fabric) or the NeoForge mod list.

### Credits
- [username65735](https://github.com/user2949) - original [Compact F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/compact-f3) and [open-source release](https://github.com/user2949/CompactF3-NeoForge)
